title: Implement and monitor WHS and environmental management systems
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement and monitor WHS and environmental management systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Implement requirements for the WHS and environmental management systems

pcs.text: Follow workplace processes to ensure WHS and environmental responsibilities and duties are documented and accountability processes are in place
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace processes to ensure WHS and environmental responsibilities and duties are documented and accountability processes are in place?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace processes to ensure WHS and environmental responsibilities and duties are documented and accountability processes are in place.

pcs.text: Follow workplace processes to ensure WHS and environmental policies and procedures are documented and that documents are accessible to all relevant personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace processes to ensure WHS and environmental policies and procedures are documented and that documents are accessible to all relevant personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace processes to ensure WHS and environmental policies and procedures are documented and that documents are accessible to all relevant personnel.

pcs.text: Take action to ensure implications of any proposed changes to the WHS and environmental management systems are identified and addressed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take action to ensure implications of any proposed changes to the WHS and environmental management systems are identified and addressed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take action to ensure implications of any proposed changes to the WHS and environmental management systems are identified and addressed.

pcs.text: Recognise limits of own professional expertise and consult specialists as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise limits of own professional expertise and consult specialists as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise limits of own professional expertise and consult specialists as necessary.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide information to employees in a format that is readily accessible and understandable.
